/opt/one_hammer/sdlc.prompt:
After updating the SDLC repo, add one Markdown file at the zip root:

SDLC_CHANGE_REPORT.md

This file must be visible immediately after extracting the zip and must be written in Vietnamese. Maximum length: 500 lines.

The report must answer every requirement in this prompt one by one, with no skipped items. For each item, include these short sections:

Requirement: quote/summarize the requirement.
What was found: issue found in repo/transcript.
What was changed: concrete files/folders/scripts/hooks/docs changed.
Why this solves it: brief explanation.
Demo impact: what can be shown in the next demo.

Keep it concise, easy to review, and focused on concrete changes, not theory.

At the end, add:

Summary of important changed files

List key added/changed files with one-line explanations.

The returned zip is incomplete if SDLC_CHANGE_REPORT.md is missing, longer than 500 lines, or does not explicitly answer every requirement.
